finding: Canonical queue reconciliation requires independently captured proposal, review, application, and post-application witnesses. Proposal-time integrity alone does not establish freshness at mutation time.

verification.method: GitHub contents API commit acknowledgement followed by immutable commit reference retention
limits: No recursive queue-update tree digest was generated.
No canonical queue file was changed.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and operational artifacts only; private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
